name: Power BI Deployment
description: Deploy Semantic Model (Direct Lake TMDL on GoldLH) and Power BI Report (PBIR, 10 pages) with automated folder organization under '05 - Analytics'.

tasks.name: Resolve GoldLH Endpoint
tasks.description: Look up GoldLH Lakehouse and resolve its SQL endpoint connection string. Wait up to 120s for endpoint provisioning if needed.

tasks.name: Create Folder Structure
tasks.description: Create or resolve workspace folder hierarchy: '05 - Analytics' > 'Semantic Model' + 'Report' subfolders.

tasks.name: Deploy Semantic Model
tasks.description: Deploy HorizonBooksModel Semantic Model from TMDL definition files. Substitute SQL endpoint and lakehouse name placeholders. 23 tables, 27 relationships, 96 DAX measures. Strip UTF-8 BOM from TMDL files.

tasks.name: Deploy Power BI Report
tasks.description: Deploy HorizonBooksAnalytics Report from PBIR definition. Rewrite definition.pbir from byPath to byConnection referencing semantic model ID. Remap RegisteredResources to StaticResources. 10-page report.

tasks.name: Organize in Folders
tasks.description: Move Semantic Model to 'Semantic Model' subfolder and Report to 'Report' subfolder under '05 - Analytics'.
